---
name: 🆕 New Skill Contribution
about: Contribute a new skill to the Arabic Skills Library
title: '[SKILL] <skill-slug> - <skill-name>'
labels: ['new skill', 'awaiting review']
assignees: []
---

## Skill Information | معلومات المهارة

**Skill Slug (English name):** 
<!-- Example: arabic-email-drafter -->

**Skill Name (Arabic):** 
<!-- مثال: كاتب البريد الإلكتروني العربي -->

**Category:** 
<!-- Choose one: business | government | education | developer | healthcare | media | security | linguistics -->

**Language:** 
<!-- Choose one: ar (Arabic only) | en (English only) | bilingual -->

**Dialect:** 
<!-- Choose one: msa | gulf | levantine | egyptian | bilingual -->

**Compliance Frameworks (if applicable):** 
<!-- Example: nca-ecc, sama-csf, pdpl, vision2030. Leave blank if not applicable -->

---

## Description | الوصف

**English Description (2-3 sentences):**
<!-- Brief description of what this skill does -->



**Arabic Description (٢-٣ جمل):**
<!-- وصف موجز بالعربية لما تفعله هذه المهارة -->



---

## Skill File | ملف المهارة

- [ ] I have created the SKILL.md file following the template format
- [ ] I have included all required frontmatter fields
- [ ] I have written the skill body in the appropriate language
- [ ] I have added trigger keywords in both Arabic and English
- [ ] I have included at least one example (input/output)

**Path to skill file:** 
<!-- Example: skills/business/arabic-email-drafter/SKILL.md -->



---

## Examples | الأمثلة

- [ ] I have added example input/output files in the `examples/` directory
- [ ] Examples demonstrate realistic use cases

**Number of examples provided:** 



---

## Testing | الاختبار

- [ ] I have validated the skill using `node tools/validate-skill.js <path-to-skill>`
- [ ] I have tested the skill with at least one LLM (Claude, GPT-4, JAIS, etc.)
- [ ] The skill produces expected outputs for the given inputs

**LLMs tested:** 
<!-- Example: Claude 3.5, GPT-4, JAIS -->



---

## Contributor Information | معلومات المساهم

**GitHub Username:** 

**Are you a native Arabic speaker?** 
<!-- Yes / No -->

**Domain expertise (if applicable):** 
<!-- Example: Healthcare, Legal, Education, Cybersecurity, etc. -->

**Volunteer badge eligibility:** 
<!-- This is your 1st/5th/10th skill contribution -->

---

## Additional Notes | ملاحظات إضافية

<!-- Any additional information you'd like to share -->



---

## Checklist | قائمة التحقق

Before submitting, please ensure:

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My skill follows the SKILL_TEMPLATE.md format
- [ ] I have used proper Arabic grammar and punctuation
- [ ] Trigger keywords include both Arabic and English phrases
- [ ] I have not included any sensitive or confidential information
- [ ] The skill is my original work or properly attributed

---

**Thank you for contributing to the Arabic Skills Library! 🎉**

**شكراً لمساهمتك في مكتبة المهارات العربية! 🎉**
